name: observepoint-consultant
description: Community-built Claude Code marketplace for the ObservePoint Consultant skill — a world-class ObservePoint and web-governance advisor.

plugins.name: observepoint-consultant
plugins.description: World-class ObservePoint and web-governance advisor for Claude Code: a hub skill plus six focused advisors — privacy-compliance (GDPR/CCPA/US state laws/HIPAA, consent & CMP verification), litigation-defense (CIPA/VPPA/BIPA pixel evidence for counsel), accessibility (ADA/Section 508/WCAG/EAA), tag-and-analytics-quality (tag risk, GA4/Adobe data correctness), account-and-program (setup, rules, reporting, program health), and automation-and-testing (REST/MCP automation, CI gates, Journeys).
